title: Meta Cuts Thousands of Jobs to Focus on Artificial Intelligence
subtitle: The tech giant is changing its business strategy as it tries to catch up in the race for AI dominance.

summary.en: Meta is laying off 8,000 employees as part of a major company reorganization. The company is moving thousands of other workers into new teams focused on artificial intelligence. This shift marks a move away from the company's previous focus on the 'Metaverse'. Meta is currently trying to catch up to competitors like Google and OpenAI. The company also faces ongoing legal challenges regarding the impact of its platforms on young people.
summary.zh: Meta 正裁減 8,000 名員工，作為公司重大重組的一部分。該公司正將數千名其他員工調往專注於人工智慧的新團隊。此轉變標誌著公司從先前對「元宇宙」的關注中撤出。Meta 目前正試圖追趕 Google 與 OpenAI 等競爭對手。該公司同時面臨關於其平台對年輕人影響的持續法律挑戰。

paragraphs.en: Meta, the parent company of Facebook, Instagram, and WhatsApp, has started a major reorganization of its business. This process involves cutting 8,000 jobs, which represents about 10% of the company’s total workforce. According to NPR, the company confirmed on Wednesday that the employees affected by these layoffs have already been notified.
paragraphs.zh: 擁有臉書 (Facebook)、Instagram 與 WhatsApp 的母公司 Meta，已啟動一項重大的企業重組計畫。此過程涉及裁減 8,000 名員工，約佔該公司總人力的一成。根據美國國家公共廣播電台 (NPR) 報導，該公司於週三證實，受此裁員影響的員工皆已收到通知。

paragraphs.en: This change is part of a larger plan to shift the company's focus toward artificial intelligence (AI) — computer systems that can perform tasks that usually require human intelligence. While 8,000 people are losing their jobs, the company is also changing the roles of another 7,000 employees. These workers are being moved to new teams that will build AI tools and applications. A source familiar with the situation explained that these moves are designed to help the company focus more on AI projects.
paragraphs.zh: 這項變革是公司將重心轉向人工智慧 (AI) 的大型計畫之一，所謂人工智慧是指能執行通常需要人類智慧才能完成任務的電腦系統。在 8,000 人面臨失業的同時，公司也正在調整另外 7,000 名員工的職務。這些員工將被調往開發人工智慧工具與應用程式的新團隊。一位知情人士解釋，這些調動旨在協助公司更專注於人工智慧專案。

paragraphs.en: Meta is currently in a difficult position as it tries to compete with other big technology companies. For years, CEO Mark Zuckerberg promoted the "Metaverse" — a virtual world where people can interact using digital avatars — as the future of the company. However, the company is now pulling back from that project to focus on the growing AI industry. Meta is currently behind competitors like OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google in this area. To try and catch up, Meta has been spending large amounts of money on new data centers and hiring top talent with very high salaries. In January, the company predicted that its spending on these projects this year would be almost double the amount it spent last year.
paragraphs.zh: Meta 目前處於艱難處境，正試圖與其他大型科技公司競爭。多年來，執行長祖克柏 (Mark Zuckerberg) 一直將「元宇宙」(Metaverse)——即人們能透過數位虛擬化身互動的虛擬世界——視為公司的未來。然而，公司目前正從該專案撤回，轉而聚焦於成長中的人工智慧產業。Meta 在此領域目前落後於 OpenAI、Anthropic 與 Google 等競爭對手。為了設法追趕，Meta 一直在新的資料中心上投入巨資，並以極高薪資聘請頂尖人才。該公司在一月預測，今年在這些專案上的支出將幾乎是去年的兩倍。

paragraphs.en: This reorganization at Meta is not an isolated event. Across the technology sector, many large companies have announced job cuts in recent months. These companies are all trying to save money so they can spend more on the expensive development of AI technology. While the industry sees AI as the next big thing, the transition is proving to be difficult for many workers who are seeing their roles change or disappear entirely.
paragraphs.zh: Meta 的這次重組並非單一事件。近幾個月來，整個科技產業的許多大型公司都宣布了裁員計畫。這些公司都在設法節省開支，以便能投入更多資金在昂貴的人工智慧技術開發上。儘管產業將人工智慧視為下一個重大趨勢，但對於許多職位面臨變動或完全消失的員工而言，這場轉型正證明是一項艱鉅的挑戰。

paragraphs.en: Beyond the challenges of shifting its business strategy, Meta is also dealing with serious legal problems. Earlier this year, the company lost important court cases in New Mexico and California. These cases claimed that Meta’s social media platforms have been harmful to the mental health of children and young people. The legal trouble is not over yet, as the company is scheduled to return to court in June. In that upcoming case, various school districts are suing social media companies, arguing that these platforms have caused a costly crisis of social media addiction and mental health problems among students.
paragraphs.zh: 除了調整商業策略的挑戰外，Meta 還面臨嚴重的法律問題。今年稍早，該公司在新墨西哥州與加州的幾起重要訴訟中敗訴。這些案件指控 Meta 的社群媒體平台對兒童與青少年的心理健康造成危害。法律糾紛尚未結束，該公司預計將於六月重返法庭。在即將到來的案件中，多個學區正對社群媒體公司提起訴訟，主張這些平台導致了學生之間代價高昂的社群媒體成癮與心理健康危機。

paragraphs.en: Industry experts note that Meta is at a turning point. By cutting jobs and moving thousands of employees into AI-focused teams, the company is betting its future on its ability to succeed in the AI race. However, the combination of a difficult business pivot and ongoing legal battles creates a challenging environment for the company. As Meta moves forward, it must balance the need to innovate with the pressure to fix the problems caused by its existing platforms. Whether this new strategy will be enough to help Meta catch up to its rivals remains to be seen.
paragraphs.zh: 產業專家指出，Meta 正處於轉捩點。透過裁員並將數千名員工調往專注於人工智慧的團隊，該公司正將未來押注在於人工智慧競賽中取得成功的能力上。然而，艱難的商業轉型與持續進行的法律訴訟，為公司創造了充滿挑戰的環境。隨著 Meta 向前邁進，它必須在創新需求與解決現有平台所引發問題的壓力之間取得平衡。這項新策略是否足以協助 Meta 追趕上競爭對手，仍有待觀察。

keyTerms.definitionEn: To decide to stop doing something or to reduce involvement in a project.
keyTerms.definitionZh: 撤回、退出或減少對某事物的投入。
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見於實體動作，這裡指抽象的商業策略調整。文中：However, the company is now pulling back from that project to focus on the growing AI industry.

keyTerms.definitionEn: To risk money or resources on the outcome of something in the hope of winning.
keyTerms.definitionZh: 將賭注押在……上；冒險投入資源以求成功。
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見於賭博，這裡比喻將公司的未來寄託於某項策略。文中：By cutting jobs and moving thousands of employees into AI-focused teams, the company is betting its future on its ability to succeed in the AI race.

keyTerms.definitionEn: A significant change in strategy or direction for a business.
keyTerms.noteZh: 原意為旋轉軸心，這裡指公司經營方向的重大轉變。文中：However, the combination of a difficult business pivot and ongoing legal battles creates a challenging environment for the company.

sources.name: NPR News
sources.title: Meta slashes 8,000 jobs as it pivots towards AI

quiz.question: What is the specific change in Meta's workforce regarding the 7,000 employees mentioned in the second paragraph?

options.A: They are being laid off along with the 8,000 other employees.
options.B: They are being reassigned to new teams focused on AI development.
options.C: They are being promoted to management positions to oversee AI projects.
options.D: They are being asked to leave the company to save money for data centers.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 B。根據文章第二段，文中明確提到除了裁員的 8,000 人之外，Meta 還在調整另外 7,000 名員工的職位，將他們調往開發 AI 工具與應用程式的新團隊。選項 A 錯誤，因為這 7,000 人並非被解僱；選項 C 錯誤，文中並未提及升遷至管理職；選項 D 錯誤，這些員工是為了轉型而非單純為了省錢而被調動。

quiz.question: What can be inferred about Meta's current financial strategy regarding the Metaverse and AI?

options.A: Meta plans to invest equally in both the Metaverse and AI projects this year.
options.B: Meta believes the Metaverse is still more profitable than AI in the long term.
options.C: Meta is prioritizing AI development by reallocating resources away from the Metaverse.
options.D: Meta is abandoning all digital avatar technology to focus exclusively on data centers.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 C。根據第三段，雖然祖克柏過去曾大力推廣「元宇宙」，但公司現在正撤回對該計畫的投入，轉而專注於成長中的 AI 產業，並預測今年在 AI 相關項目上的支出將比去年增加近一倍。這顯示公司正在進行資源重分配。選項 A 與文章內容矛盾；選項 B 與文中提到的「撤回」背道而馳；選項 D 過於誇大，文中並未說要放棄所有技術。

quiz.question: In the final paragraph, what does the word 'pivot' mean as used in the context of Meta's business strategy?

options.A: A sudden change in direction or focus.
options.B: A physical rotation of computer hardware.
options.C: A legal argument used in court cases.
options.D: A financial loss caused by poor management.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 A。在商業語境中，「pivot」指的是企業為了適應市場變化而進行的策略性轉型或方向調整。文中提到 Meta 從元宇宙轉向 AI，這就是一個典型的商業 pivot。選項 B 將其誤解為物理動作；選項 C 與 D 雖然與文章提到的困難有關，但並非該詞彙的正確定義。

quiz.question: Which of the following best summarizes the main message of the article?

options.A: Meta is successfully leading the AI industry ahead of Google and OpenAI.
options.B: Meta is facing a difficult transition as it pivots to AI while managing legal and operational challenges.
options.C: The job cuts at Meta are primarily due to the company's loss in court cases in New Mexico.
options.D: Meta's decision to focus on AI is a popular move that has been welcomed by all its employees.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 B。整篇文章探討了 Meta 如何透過裁員與組織重組來轉向 AI 發展，同時也指出了這項策略轉型面臨的競爭壓力、法律訴訟以及員工變動等挑戰，這正是文章的核心主旨。選項 A 與文意不符，Meta 仍在追趕對手；選項 C 將裁員原因過度簡化，忽略了 AI 轉型的背景；選項 D 錯誤，文中提到轉型對許多員工來說是困難的。

aiDisclaimer: 本文由 AI 綜合多家報導生成，事實請以原始來源為準。
